creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 193611
shar for updated version (1.8) of the port sysutils/mkdesktop

My port sysutils/mkdesktop has been updated to version 1.8 (from old version 1.6) to reflect new KDE4 package names. I ran the new port version through portlint and poudriere with no errors. The shar for the new version 1.8 is attached. Can someone please update the port in FreeBSD mainstream ? Thank you.
